read_aloud.title: Summer Holidays
read_aloud.passage: I love my summer holidays very much. I go swimming with my brother. We also go to the library together. My parents want to take us to Japan this year. I can try some yummy food there!
questions: Do you love your summer holidays?
What do you do with your brother?
Where do your parents want to take you?
What can you try in Japan?

picture_answer.title: On the Bus
picture_answer.instruction: Here is a picture of people on a bus. Study the picture and answer the teacher's questions.

questions.question: What does the woman want to bring onto the bus?
What does the driver say to the woman?
Why is this girl so happy?
questions.pointTo: the girl listening to music on her mobile phone

questions.question: How does this man feel?
questions.pointTo: the man sitting next to the girl

questions.question: What is this girl doing?
questions.pointTo: the girl offering her seat to the old man

questions.question: Is it good to do that? Why / Why not?
What does this man say to the girl?

reading_interaction.title: Outdoor Learning Day
reading_interaction.passage: Last Friday, our school held an Outdoor Learning Day. The weather was warm and sunny. We spent the day on a farm. In the morning, we helped the farmer plant some seeds and water the vegetables. In the afternoon, we made bread and fruit salad. It was a tiring but fun day! We learnt that food does not come easily. We must treasure food.
interaction_questions: What did the school hold last Friday?
Where did they spend the day?
What did they do in the morning?
What did they do in the afternoon?
Was it a tiring or easy day?
What did they learn from this experience?
Do you think Outdoor Learning Day is a good idea? Why?
What outdoor activity would you like to try?

presentation.title: Walking Along a Busy Road
presentation.instruction:
You are going to talk about walking along a busy road. Use the information below or your own ideas to do the presentation. You will have two minutes to complete the task.

Remember:
• Do not write on this Instruction Card.
• Look at the teacher when you do the presentation.
helping_questions: Where do you see busy roads in Hong Kong?
What kinds of transport are there on a busy road?
What transport do you usually take? Why?
Who do you see on a busy road?
What shops do you see there?
What shops do you usually go to? Why?
How do you cross the road safely?
Do you like walking along a busy road? Why / Why not?
